generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path calculated for crane movement to minimize time or energy"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted crane behavior from simulation for comparison with real data"
]

instance ValidationThresholdBreachedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when sensor data exceeds predefined thresholds"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stored historical data for trend analysis and maintenance planning"
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission via MQTT protocol"
]

instance NotifyOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends alert to operators via Grafana dashboard for maintenance decisions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages storage and retrieval of time-series data using TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes system state and alerts via Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides NotifyOperatorAction
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal movement paths for crane cart and hoist",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for validation and prediction",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulation data for validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationThresholdBreachedInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages MQTT communication between physical and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and simulation logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of digital twin services",
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization and dashboard platform",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for physical system design",
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for optimizing crane trajectory based on kinematic constraints",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion angle for gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed in the harbor environment",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data collected from sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data collected from sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ArduinoHardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for interfacing sensors and actuators"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls horizontal movement of crane cart"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vertical hoisting movement of crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance GantryCraneDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService, ArduinoHardware, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service transmitted to Physical Crane Interface for motor control via the Control Application, enabling precise crane movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for validation and logging, with data streamed as events occur; no specific time intervals specified but continuous monitoring for operational tasks."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane with controller connected to digital twin components via MQTT broker; digital side includes containerized services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) and Python-based control applications, all deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers the 'as operated' phase, supporting operational monitoring, validation, and fault detection during crane operation; no mention of design or manufacturing phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulations using distance metrics; breaches of threshold trigger operator notifications for validity checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitates inter-service communication within the digital twin; physical component communication protocols are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip on a single personal computer."
]
